/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -O2 -g -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test.dir/test_llm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test.dir/src/cjson/cJSON.c.o -o /home/wangqx/work/mlc_llm_test/test   -L/home/wangqx/work/mlc_llm_test/3rdparty/mlc_llm/3rdparty/tvm/lib  -L/usr/local/cuda/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/home/wangqx/work/mlc_llm_test/3rdparty/mlc_llm/3rdparty/tvm/lib:/usr/local/cuda/lib64:/usr/local/lib:/home/wangqx/work/mlc_llm_test/build/lib:/home/wangqx/work/mlc_llm_test/build/mlc_llm -lcudart /usr/local/lib/libopencv_world.so.3.4.2 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_world.so.3.4.2 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_world.so.3.4.2 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_world.so.3.4.2 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_world.so.3.4.2 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_world.so.3.4.2 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_world.so.3.4.2 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_world.so.3.4.2 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_world.so.3.4.2 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_world.so.3.4.2 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_world.so.3.4.2 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_world.so.3.4.2 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_world.so.3.4.2 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_world.so.3.4.2 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_world.so.3.4.2 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_world.so.3.4.2 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_world.so.3.4.2 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_world.so.3.4.2 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_world.so.3.4.2 -lnvinfer -lnvinfer_plugin -lnvonnxparser -lrt -lpthread -lavcodec -lavformat -lavutil -lswscale -lflash_attn -lfpA_intB_gemm -ltvm lib/libtvm_ffi.so mlc_llm/libmlc_llm.so -Wl,--no-as-needed /usr/local/lib/libflash_attn.so
